files.patch: @@ -40,0 +40,11 @@ + * and fractional parts, and it supports E notation (exponential). + * + * @throws NumberFormatException if the string does not consist entirely of a valid number representation + * @see Consume a number + */ + public static double parseDouble(String s) { + return parseDouble(s, 0, s.length()); + } + + /** + * Parses a number according to the W3C "Consume a number" algorithm.
